name: Stir-Fried Spinach with Tofu
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Firm tofu, in 1/2 inch cubes
1 tbsp Rice wine or dry sherry
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and thoroughly dry the spinach. Remove any tough stems.
2. Place a wok over medium-high heat. When it begins to smoke, add the peanut oil and garlic.
3. Stir briefly, then add the spinach and salt.
4. Stir-fry just until the spinach is wilted (about 1 minute).
5. Gently stir in the tofu and sprinkle with rice wine.
6. Cook until the tofu is heated through (about 1 minute).
7. Serve immediately.
